title: The Trading Post- Client Enhancements
description: The Trading Post brings you a vanilla modpack intended to increase immersion and ambiance within the game and make your experience more smoother when adventuring.
body:
The Trading Post introduces Client Enhancements!  

Users playing vanilla will have some quality of life mods to experience that will add different sounds to the game, enhance visuals, as well as create a smoother experience.

Everything is fully customizable!
